title: That's So True
why_this_song: That's So True by Gracie Abrams (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Ooh, bet you're thinking, "she's so cool"
Kicking back on your couch, making eyes from across the room
Wait, I think I've been there too, ooh
What'd she do to get you off? (Uh-huh)
Ooh, bet you're thinking, "She's so cool"
Kicking back on the couch, making eyes from across the room
Wait, I think I've been there too, ooh

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "think" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "think" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "that's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "that's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I could go and read your mind
Taking down her hair like, oh my god
Remember how I died when you started walking?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Think about your dumb face all the time
Ooh, bet you're thinking, "She's so cool"

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "That's So True" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "That's So True"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Gracie Abrams one question about "That's So True", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Gracie Abrams sobre "That's So True", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "That's So True" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "That's So True" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "That's So True", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "That's So True", o que aconteceria?
